prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 10382→10897→10360→12271→13924，整体呈后移趋势，近两年加速下滑：2024 年较 2023 年下降约 1911 名，2025 年较 2024 年再降约 1653 名，累计后移约 3564 名；2025 年基准位次约 13924 名；该校在江西省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 78 人，2024–2025 年增至 79 人；2026 年计划 85 人，较 2025 年扩招 6 人（+7.6%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学秦皇岛分校共享东北大学 985、211、双一流身份；软科主榜（东北大学）2026 年约第 38 名，近年排名稳定在前 40，学校层次高、认可度强；2026 年声誉文件中东北大学（本部）评价为中性/混合，涉及校区认知争议；秦皇岛分校通过校名直接标注「校区」消除隔离感，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度一般（东北大学排名第 82）；未见投档断档或异常记录；共享东北大学学科评估：控制科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、冶金工程 A、软件工程 A-、机械工程 A-、材料科学与工程 A-，工科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、自动化、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；江西省 2026 年高考总人数约 474900 人，较 2025 年（约 472480 人）略增约 2420 人，物理类考生按比例估算约 267800 人，较 2025 年物理类（266425 人）微增约 1400 人，竞争略有加剧；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北秦皇岛，非本省高校；该校 2025 年在江西省招生 93 人（含物理类+历史类），占全国总招生 2602 人的约 3.57%，属中等偏下比例，跨省报考热度一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近两年累计下降约 3564 名）、2026 年扩招 6 人（+7.6%）对竞争形成一定对冲、本省物理类考生微增约 1400 人、学校 985/211 层次对考生仍有较强吸引力，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略加剧但扩招部分抵消；预测最低位次约 14579 名，区间 14079–15079 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 10382→10897→10360→12271→13924, showing an overall backward trend with accelerated decline in recent two years: in 2024, it dropped by about 1911 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it dropped by about 1653 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3564 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13924; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province Physics Category was 78 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 79 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 85 students, an increase of 6 students (+7.6%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao shares the 985, 211, and Double First-Class status of Northeastern University; on the Soft Science main ranking (Northeastern University), it is approximately 38th in 2026, with stable rankings in the top 40 in recent years, indicating a high university level and strong recognition; in the 2026 reputation document, the evaluation of Northeastern University (main campus) is neutral/mixed, involving campus recognition disputes; the Qinhuangdao campus eliminates the sense of isolation by directly marking 'campus' in its name, maintaining overall stable reputation; Douyin popularity is average (Northeastern University ranks 82nd); no records of admission cut-off drops or anomalies; shares the discipline evaluations of Northeastern University: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Software Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength, which strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information remains relatively high; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, an increase of about 2,420 compared to 2025 (about 472,480), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 267,800, a slight increase of about 1,400 compared to 2025 Physics Category (266,425), leading to slightly intensified competition; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, not a local university in this province; in 2025, it enrolled 93 students in Jiangxi Province (including Physics and History Categories), accounting for about 3.57% of the total national enrollment of 2,602, which is a relatively low proportion, and cross-province application popularity is average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative decline of about 3,564 places in the past two years), the expansion of 6 students (+7.6%) in 2026 which partially offsets competition, a slight increase of about 1,400 Physics Category examinees in this province, and the strong attraction of the university's 985/211 level to examinees, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025 but partially offset by the expansion; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14,579, with a range of 14,079–15,079.

- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (14,079–15,079), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Automation) as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 14,000), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology or Automation; for rankings near the upper bound (around 15,000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by lower-ranked Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering and Materials Science.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao shares the 985, 211, and Double First-Class status of Northeastern University; on the Soft Science main ranking (Northeastern University) in 2026 approximately 38th, high university level, but as a science and engineering institution, its liberal arts programs are small in scale; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, overall stable; Douyin popularity average; no abnormal filing records seen; shares Northeastern University's discipline evaluations with no directly corresponding A-class disciplines in liberal arts, but economics and management disciplines such as Business Administration and Applied Economics rely on the university's overall platform and have a certain degree of recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics, Business Administration, and other economics and management majors have divided social popularity and are being watched; total number of Jiangxi Gaokao examinees in 2026 approximately 474,900, with History Category examinees estimated at about 207,100 by proportion, a slight increase of about 1,000 compared to 2025 History Category (206,055), competition slightly intensified; the university is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, not a provincial university; History Category has only 3 majors (Economics, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration), small enrollment numbers, cross-province application popularity average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 ranking increase (intensified competition), 2026 expansion of 1 student (+7.1%) forming a hedge, a slight increase of about 1,000 History Category examinees in the province, high university level but few liberal arts majors and small scale, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly relieved compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 2409, range 2048–2770.
